title: Encyclopedia (disambiguation)
content:
An '''encyclopedia''' is a comprehensive reference work with articles usually arranged in alphabetical order. There are a number of ''Star Wars''–related encyclopedias:
__NOTOC__
===In-universe encyclopedias===
*[[Encyclopedia Galactica]]
*[[Imperial Encyclopedia]]
*[[The Galactic Encyclopedia]]
*[[Universal Encyclopedia]]

===Real-world encyclopedias===
*''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Visual Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia: The Comprehensive Guide to the Star Wars Galaxy]]''
=====Character Encyclopedias=====
*''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia: Updated and Expanded]]''
*''[[Star Wars Character Encyclopedia, New Edition]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Character Encyclopedia, Updated and Expanded Edition]]''
=====Era-Specific Encyclopedias=====
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Character Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Character Encyclopedia - Join the Battle!]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Rogue One: Ultimate Sticker Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Character Encyclopedia]]''
=====Starfighter Encyclopedias=====
*''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles]]''
*''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles (second edition)|Star Wars Encyclopedia of Starfighters and Other Vehicles, second edition]]''
=====Other Encyclopedias=====
*[[Encyclopedia (StarWars.com)|StarWars.com Encyclopedia]]
*[[Star Wars Encyclopedia (series)|''Star Wars Encyclopedia'' (De Agostini)]]

*''[[Angry Birds Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]''
*''[[LEGO Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]''

*''[[LEGO Star Wars Character Encyclopedia: New Edition]]''
